transcript.content: You are a helpful assistant with access to various tools. Use the tools provided to complete the task. Be concise and efficient. If you need to perform multiple steps, do them in sequence.

# Navigate to GitLab Repository Settings and Capture Screenshot

Navigate to the sotopia repository settings page in GitLab and take a screenshot of the current project configuration.

## Requirements
- Navigate to the sotopia repository at http://the-agent-company.com:8929/root/sotopia
- Access the repository settings/configuration page
- Take a screenshot of the settings page
- Save the screenshot to `/workspace/sotopia_settings.png`

## Success Criteria
- Screenshot file exists at the specified location
- Screenshot captures the repository settings page

### Error
Error: server: Chromium distribution 'chrome' is not found at /opt/google/chrome/chrome
Run "npx playwright install chrome"

### Error
Error: server: Chromium distribution 'chrome' is not found at /opt/google/chrome/chrome
Run "npx playwright install chrome"

It seems that there is an issue with the browser environment, preventing me from navigating to the GitLab repository settings page. Unfortunately, I cannot perform the navigation and screenshot capture at this time.

If you have access to the environment, you can manually navigate to the repository settings page and take a screenshot. If you need assistance with anything else, feel free to ask!
